title: Managing Online Conflict & Responsible Decision-Making
description: Assessment of de-escalation, reporting, safe responses, and ethical choices in online conflict.

questions.prompt: What is the most appropriate first step when encountering conflict online?

choices.feedback: Responding emotionally can escalate the situation.
Correct. Taking time to think helps prevent escalation and supports responsible decisions.
Avoiding all communication is not a balanced or effective response.
Public sharing can escalate conflict and create additional issues.

questions.prompt: Responding calmly can help de-escalate online conflict.

choices.feedback: Correct. Calm responses reduce tension and help resolve conflict.
Calm communication is a key strategy for de-escalation.

questions.prompt: Which action is an example of responsible decision-making during an online conflict?

choices.text: Posting personal information about the other person
choices.feedback: Sharing personal information is unsafe and inappropriate.

choices.text: Reporting harmful behavior to a trusted adult or platform
choices.feedback: Correct. Reporting is a safe and responsible action.

choices.text: Continuing the argument to prove a point
choices.feedback: Continuing conflict often makes the situation worse.

choices.text: Encouraging others to join the conflict
choices.feedback: Involving others can escalate the situation further.

questions.prompt: What is a safe response to harmful or inappropriate online behavior?

choices.feedback: Responding negatively can escalate the situation.
Safety concerns should always be addressed.
Correct. These actions help protect yourself and others.
Public sharing can make the situation worse.

questions.prompt: Why is it important to make ethical choices during online conflicts?

choices.text: Because ethical choices help resolve conflict safely and respectfully
choices.feedback: Correct. Ethical decisions promote safety and respect.

choices.text: Because ethical choices make conflicts last longer
choices.feedback: Ethical choices help resolve, not prolong, conflicts.

choices.text: Because ethical choices are only required in school settings
choices.feedback: Ethical behavior applies in all digital environments.

choices.text: Because ethical choices are optional online
choices.feedback: Ethical behavior is always important online.
